brief: Retatrutide: The Trial Results Are Real. The Online Certainty Is Not.
method: DOI/PMID metadata and primary PubMed abstracts reviewed directly; publication requires a fresh official regulatory-status check.

sources.evidence_level: Phase 2 randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled adult obesity trial
sources.verification_note: Primary PubMed abstract reviewed 2026-07-19. The primary endpoint was week 24; week-48 weight change was a secondary endpoint. Do not infer long-term maintenance or phase-3 obesity outcomes.

sources.evidence_level: Phase 2 randomized, double-blind, placebo- and active-controlled adult type-2-diabetes trial
sources.verification_note: Primary PubMed abstract reviewed 2026-07-19. Applies to selected adults with type 2 diabetes, not to unapproved use, adolescents, or social-media dosing practices.

sources.evidence_level: Phase 3 randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled adult type-2-diabetes monotherapy trial
sources.verification_note: Primary PubMed abstract reviewed 2026-07-19. This is a diabetes-monotherapy trial; it does not establish phase-3 obesity outcomes or long-term cardiovascular benefit.

sources.evidence_level: Prespecified DXA substudy of a phase 2 randomized adult type-2-diabetes trial
claims: lean-mass-loss proportion was similar to other obesity treatments
sources.verification_note: Primary PubMed abstract reviewed 2026-07-19. The substudy does not show that lean mass is preserved or resolve functional muscle outcomes.
